The Art of Quiet Luxury Every Velmora piece begins with a sketch and a story. We believe jewelry should feel personal — 
              not mass-produced. Our artisans hand-finish each design using 18K gold plating over hypoallergenic 
              bases, creating pieces that look and feel like fine jewelry at a fraction of the price. artisan crafting gold jewelry workshop
